## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- Included:
- Not included:

## Verification

- [ ] Backend lint passes.
- [ ] Backend tests pass.
- [ ] Backend build check passes.
- [ ] Frontend lint passes.
- [ ] Frontend production build passes.
- [ ] Relevant manual scenarios were tested.

## Contract and Data Changes

List API, socket, model, environment, or migration changes. Write `None` when there are none.

## Evidence

Add screenshots, API output, or logs that demonstrate the result.

## Documentation

- [ ] Relevant documentation was updated.
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, generated output, recordings, or database dumps are included.

## Follow-up

List known limitations or linked issues.

> A pull request must not be approved, accepted, or merged until both required CI checks pass on the latest commit.
